channel.title: Tils on Hello, I'm Jae
channel.description: Recent content in Tils on Hello, I'm Jae

item.title: 10 weeks challenge - day 01
item.description: What I thought today I’m starting a web development challenge with Nomadcoders(nomadcoders.co). This 10 weeks challenge is to review my JS knowledges and to start bootstrapping my ideas. I don’t think this would cover everything, but I’m just hoping that I can meet some people who can talk about programming and have fun. Today I learned basic understanding on HTML, CSS and JS environment setup Resources kokoa clone 1.
